name: Maria
quote: If it pays for itself in 3 months, I'll plug it in tomorrow.

name: Derek
role: VP of Innovation, Big Box Co.
quote: Procurement, security, legal — all three say yes or it's a no.

name: Priya
quote: I'll try anything, but Instagram already does this better.

name: Eli
quote: My customers came here to escape Big Tech. Cameras kill that.
